meaning: n.注射,注射剂,(毛细血管等的)充血,(人造卫星,宇宙飞船等的)射入轨道
examples: An anaesthetic was administered by injection.
You may notice redness and swelling after the injection.
An injection of local anaesthetic is usually given first to numb the area.
Making matters even worse, most of these drugs can only be given by injection.
It has 621 bhp and 590 foot-pounds of torque from a 6-liter, direct-injection engine.
